Off Calendar Jul-16-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: atty ryan l. dahm of cook collection attorneys plc t: 415.989.4730 e: dahm@cookcollectionattorneys.com for Plaintiff Align technology; no other appearances.

Ruling- argued, PLAINTIFF ALIGN TECHNOLOGY, INC.'s Motion For Assignment Of Rights, Restraining Order And Turnover Order is unopposed and granted. order signed in open court.Judge: steven stein; Clerk: Johnny Sengmany (jpt/302).

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-10-2019 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been continued from Monday, June 3, 2019 for Prove-Up Hearing as to defendants Sherif Said, an individual, a/k/a Sherif Magdi Ishak Said, a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, and a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, B.D.S., dba Cities Dental Studio, and Cities Dental Studio, PLLC, a Professional limited liability company, dba Cities Studio Dental.
Dept: 514. Judge: Gail Dekreon. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Mitch L. Lyon, CSR #6840. Telephone: 415-551-3703. Email: mlyon@sftc.org.

David J. Cook, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a corporation.
No Appearance by defendants Sherif Said, an individual, a/k/a Sherif Magdi Ishak Said, a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, and a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, B.D.S., dba Cities Dental Studio, or Cities Dental Studio, PLLC, a Professional limited liability company, dba Cities Studio Dental.
Plaintiff's complaint was filed on August 2, 2018.
Defendants' Sherif Said, an individual, a/k/a Sherif Magdi Ishak Said, a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, and a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, B.D.S., dba Cities Dental Studio, and Cities Dental Studio, PLLC, a Professional limited liability company, dba Cities Studio Dental, General Denial was filed on November 6, 2019.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on January, 17, 2019, setting trial for June 3, 2019.
Re-Notice of Time and Place of Trial was served on June 3, 2019, setting trial for today, June 10, 2019.
Plaintiff's Trial Brief was filed June 3, 2019.
DOE defendants were dismissed today, June 10, 2019.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Align Technology, Inc., a corporation, and against defendants Sherif Said, an individual, a/k/a Sherif Magdi Ishak Said, a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, and a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, B.D.S., dba Cities Dental Studio, and Cities Dental Studio, PLLC, a Professional limited liability company, dba Cities Studio Dental, as follows:

Principal/Damages - $26,015.36.
Prejudgment Interest - $3,097.30.
Costs - $450.00.
Total - $29,562.66.

Judgment for both defendants (Sherif Said, an individual, a/k/a Sherif Magdi Ishak Said, a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, and a/k/a Dr. Sherif Said, B.D.S., dba Cities Dental Studio, and Cities Dental Studio, PLLC, a Professional limited liability company, dba Cities Studio Dental) is JOINT & SEVERAL.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
